title: 4. Kanban board UI
description: Implement Shadcn UI layout with tabs for Initiatives, Epics, Tasks. Render status columns and issue cards. Drill into a task-level issue to show sub-task board.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented kanban UI with tabs for initiatives/epics/tasks, status columns from config, issue cards, and task drill-in to sub-task board.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted app to avoid fallback config; board renders only after snapshot loads with explicit waiting state.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted column error to only surface when config is loaded (no pre-snapshot error noise).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Close task detail panel automatically when switching tabs.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Clear task detail panel if selected task disappears on snapshot update.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added empty sub-task copy in task detail panel when no children exist.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed App.tsx hook order bug: config/issues now initialized before effects to avoid ReferenceError.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set default tab to Epics and updated console BDD feature expectations.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Persisted view mode in localStorage with default to epics and added console BDD scenarios for default/remembered view.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Redesigned console UI to flat style: removed gradients, borders, shadows; enforced P3 spacing and tighter layout per console AGENTS.md.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed top header block, outer wrapper card, and Live status label for tighter layout.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reduced vertical padding for tab selector (shorter tab list and triggers).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Switched typography to default Shadcn-style Inter stack and updated font import.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted issue type accent band to cover the full top portion of cards including rounded corners.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Tabs filter correctly: Initiatives only, Epics only, Tasks include task plus config types. Sub-task view only on task drill-in. Cards show id, title, type, status, priority, assignee.
